final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a pristine old-growth forest at dawn with dramatic natural lighting.

Style/medium: photorealistic landscape photography, Ansel Adams-inspired tonal range, wide-angle nature documentary
Composition: wide-angle shot at forest floor level, 16-35mm lens, pronounced depth of field with foreground-to-background layering, low vantage point
Subject: ancient moss-covered boulders, foreground ferns and wild mushrooms, towering redwood trunks rising vertically, distant mountain silhouettes
Scene/backdrop: dense primeval forest interior, early morning atmosphere with lingering mist, winding clear mountain stream reflecting greenery
Lighting/mood: first morning sunlight piercing through dense canopy creating visible Tyndall light rays (god rays), soft diffused ambient light mixed with directional sunbeams, mysterious and serene mood
Color palette: deep forest green as base, emerald green midtones, golden sunlight highlights as accent, rich tonal gradation
Materials/textures: velvety moss on weathered stone, delicate fern fronds, smooth water surface with reflections, rough redwood bark
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial sharpening halos, watermark, plastic-looking vegetation, cartoonish rendering
